attacking_style: Commits to early breakaways on stages expected to end in bunch sprints, exploiting disorganized peloton chase dynamics to solo for extended periods.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to determine clear team support patterns. Appears to operate opportunistically in breaks without visible lead-out or tempo control.
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling sprint-designated stages where peloton complacency creates breakaway windows. Capitalizes when teams miscalculate chase timing.
vulnerability: Limited observations prevent clear vulnerability assessment. May struggle when pelotons organize proper chase or on terrain requiring pure climbing/sprinting specialization.
key_patterns: Wins from early breakaways on sprint stages when peloton fails to organize (1 observation, noted as repeatable)
Executes same tactical pattern on multi-year cycle suggesting calculated timing rather than opportunism
Capable of sustaining significant solo efforts with 59-second winning margin over chasing peloton
form_trajectory: unknown: Single 2019 observation shows race-winning capability but insufficient recent data for trajectory assessment
